title: Plasmid Extraction Protocol
author: Tjusls China
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.489gzz6

steps.title: Collect the E
steps.instruction: Collect the E. coli solution into the EP tube. Centrifuge at 12,000 rpm in a rotor for 1 minute. Remove the clear supernatant liquid. 00:01:00

steps.title: Add 250μL P1 (RNase A added,...
steps.instruction: Add 250μL P1 (RNase A added, kept at 4 °C)to the EP tube to suspend bacterial precipitation . 4 °C 250 µL

steps.title: Add 250μL P2 to the EP...
steps.instruction: Add 250μL P2 to the EP tube, shake slightly up and down 6-8 times to lyse bacteria. 250 µL

steps.title: Add 350μL P3 and invert the...
steps.instruction: Add 350μL P3 and invert the tube immediately and gently 6-8 times. Then centrifuge it at 12000rpm, 25℃ for 10 minutes. 350 µL 25 °C 00:10:00

steps.title: Regenerate column CP3 while centrifugation
steps.instruction: Regenerate column CP3 while centrifugation . Add 500μl Buffer BL. Centrifuge for 1 min at 12,000 rpm. Discard the flow-through. 500 µL

steps.title: Move the clear supernatant liquid to...
steps.instruction: Move the clear supernatant liquid to CP3, at 12000rpm, 25℃ centrifuge for 30 seconds. 25 °C 00:00:30

steps.title: Add 600μL PW to adsorption column...
steps.instruction: Add 600μL PW to adsorption column CP3, 12000rpm, 25℃ centrifuge for 30 seconds. 00:00:30 25 °C

steps.title: Move the adsorption column CP3 to...
steps.instruction: Move the adsorption column CP3 to new clean centrifuge tubes and then keep them opening for 5 minutes, so that the ethanol in the PW can be sufficiently volatilized. 00:05:00

steps.title: Drop 50μL 65°C ddwater into the...
steps.instruction: Drop 50μL 65°C ddwater into the middle of the adsorption membrane, static for 2min. Then centrifuge for 2 min at 12,000 rpm to collect DNA solution in EP tube. 50 µL 65 °C
